meaning: n.无数学和自然科学知识,数学盲,(自然)科学盲
examples: Studies shave shown other ways in which retailers can exploit consumers' innumeracy.
American innumeracy, I offer, is worse than our illiteracy, which is bad enough.
Or blame blogger Matt Drudge, who plays to American innumeracy by headlining a 387-point, one-day Dow drop with an animated ambulance siren.
Studies have shown other ways in which retailers can exploit consumers' innumeracy.
